# ProgressNotificationParams.Progress property

REQUIRED. The amount of progress so far. It MUST strictly increase across successive notifications for the same token, even when [`Total`](./Total.md) is unknown, and MAY be integral or fractional (§15.1.3).

```csharp
public double Progress { get; set; }
```
